title: pericallis tirmensis
intro: Pericallis tirmensis, also known as Tirmensis or Tirmense, is a flowering plant species within the family Asteraceae, native to the Canary Islands. It has been used for its medicinal properties, primarily to treat various health issues, including colds, fever, and respiratory problems. The plant's leaves and flowers have been traditionally used to make herbal teas and infusions, which are believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and relieving congestion. In terms of herbal preparations, Pericallis tirmensis is often combined with other herbs to create syrups, infusions, and topical treatments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
